verification.payload:
tree 76c997a2acf201a88cde9c4496d8dee60f003852
parent ce2b3460422a94b79008ddcae2f999c19ef571dd
author nobutakayamauchi <ultimaterisingson@gmail.com> 1771904947 +0900
committer GitHub <noreply@github.com> 1771904947 +0900

Update rts_escalation_recorder.yml

files.patch:
@@ -4,18 +4,16 @@ on:
   workflow_run:
     workflows:
       - "RTS Sentinel Analyze"
-      - "RTS Issue -> Incident File"
-      - "RTS Issue Close -> Incident Close"
-      - "pages build and deployment"
       - "RTS Heartbeat (Lightweight)"
-    types: [completed]
-  workflow_dispatch:
+      - "pages build and deployment"
+    types:
+      - completed
 
 permissions:
   contents: write
   actions: read
 
-# 同時実行で main push が競合しないようにする
+# 同時実行で push が競合するのを止める
 concurrency:
   group: rts-escalation-recorder-main
   cancel-in-progress: true
@@ -36,42 +34,46 @@ jobs:
         with:
           python-version: "3.11"
 
-      - name: Record failure evidence
+      - name: Record failure evidence (escalation)
         env:
           GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
           REPO: ${{ github.repository }}
           TARGET_WORKFLOW: ${{ github.event.workflow_run.name }}
           TARGET_RUN_ID: ${{ github.event.workflow_run.id }}
           TARGET_RUN_ATTEMPT: ${{ github.event.workflow_run.run_attempt }}
-          TARGET_HEAD_SHA: ${{ github.event.workflow_run.head_sha }}
           TARGET_BRANCH: ${{ github.event.workflow_run.head_branch }}
+          TARGET_HEAD_SHA: ${{ github.event.workflow_run.head_sha }}
           TARGET_CONCLUSION: ${{ github.event.workflow_run.conclusion }}
           TARGET_ACTOR: ${{ github.event.workflow_run.actor.login }}
-          # --- knobs (必要なら後で調整) ---
+
+          # ---- knobs (A運用: 自動で回す)
           WINDOW_N: "12"
           FAIL_THRESHOLD_LAST_N: "1"
           BURST_MINUTES: "30"
           BURST_FAIL_THRESHOLD: "2"
-          IMPORTANT_ONLY: "false"
-          IMPORTANT_WORKFLOWS: ""
+
+          IMPORTANT_ONLY: "true"
+          IMPORTANT_WORKFLOWS: "RTS Sentinel Analyze,RTS Heartbeat (Lightweight),pages build and deployment"
+
+          # L3にしたいときだけ追加（任意）
+          EXTRA_REFERENCE_URLS: ""
         run: |
           python scripts/rts_escalation.py
 
-      - name: Commit evidence
+      - name: Commit evidence (safe)
         run: |
-          git config user.name "rts-bot"
-          git config user.email "actions@github.com"
+          git config user.name "actions-user"
+          git config user.email "actions@users.noreply.github.com"
 
-          git add incidents || true
+          git add incidents/evidence_snapshots analysis incidents || true
 
           if git diff --cached --quiet; then
-            echo "No evidence changes"
+            echo "[ok] no changes"
             exit 0
           fi
 
-          git commit -m "RTS: escalation evidence (run ${{ github.run_id }})"
+          git commit -m "RTS: escalation evidence pack" || exit 0
 
-          # ★競合対策：他workflowのpushを取り込んでからpush
+          # 競合対策：必ず取り込んでからpush
           git pull --rebase origin main
-
           git push origin HEAD:main
